# agentic-canvas-os

Vendor-neutral routing hints for AI agents and coding tools.

Start here:
- README.md
- docs/PROJECT-RULES.md
- docs/START-WORKFLOW.md
- docs/VALIDATION-RUNBOOK.md
- docs/RUNTIME-READINESS.md

Rules:
- Use docs/PROJECT-RULES.md as the repository-owned engineering and session-closeout source of truth.
- End sessions in this repo with `npm run device:end -- --json`.
- Keep deployment, Prod mirror, and Cloudflare mutation operator-gated.
